codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal diff — 19 lines of pure deletion removing all per-present sys::print calls from the GPU driver's present loop. Both the full-screen branch (5 lines: 'gpu: present full WxH') and the dirty-rect branch (14 lines: 'gpu: present N rects [x,y wxh]...' plus trailing newline) were removed. No functional code was touched — only serial logging statements. Boot-time initialization logging (virtio-gpu ready, display dimensions, device setup complete) is correctly preserved (verified via grep). The remaining sys::print calls are all either boot-time messages (lines 726, 746, 762, 807) or error-path diagnostics (lines 198, 673, 685, 691, 697, 708, 781, 787, 799), plus the print_u32 helper (lines 356, 369). No new code was introduced, so no new bugs or edge cases are possible. The change is purely subtractive.

summary: Straightforward, correct deletion of 19 lines of per-present serial logging from the GPU driver. Both full-screen and dirty-rect present branches cleaned up. Boot-time and error logging preserved. No functional changes, no regressions possible. Build clean, all tests pass, QEMU visual verification confirmed display still works. Pass.
